similar.title: Moody's affirms SBI, HDFC Bank ratings on strong asset quality
similar.description: Moody's Ratings has confirmed the ratings for both State Bank of India and HDFC Bank, attributing a stable outlook to their robust asset quality. SBI excels with its diverse lending practices and stable net interest margins, while HDFC Bank is bolstered by a strong retail presence that ensures a low-cost deposit base. The agency forecasts that asset quality for both banks will remain stable moving forward.
